category_sources: source_facts.description says Pragmatic language for the JVM; official Gosu homepage describes Gosu as a pragmatic JVM language.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is The Gosu Programming Language; source_facts.name is gosu.
docs_sources: Official Gosu site navigation links Quickstart, Docs/Basics, and Grammar pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/gosu-lang/gosu-lang, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official Gosu homepage says it is a JVM language for Java developers with Java interoperability, type inference, scripting/program files, and static typing.
